headline: Kling 3.5 adds native multi-shot audio
summary: Kuaishou's new release generates synced dialogue and ambience across cuts in one pass. Removes the separate lip-sync step for narrative AI film work.

headline: Recraft V4.2 ships vector-native style locks
summary: Recraft's update pins a brand style across an entire generated set, in true vector output. Useful for motion designers building consistent asset packs.

headline: Trellis 3 open-sources image-to-3D at production quality
summary: Microsoft's new Trellis release turns a single still into a clean textured mesh in under a minute. Endpoint already live on fal.ai for scene-prop generation.

headline: ElevenLabs Foley 1 generates frame-synced sound effects
summary: Upload a video and Foley 1 writes the full effects track aligned to on-screen action. First serious automated foley pass for AI filmmakers.

headline: Runway Aleph 2 rewrites shots with camera re-blocking
summary: Aleph 2 re-stages an existing clip from a new camera position while keeping performance and lighting. Effectively a virtual reshoot tool.

headline: ComfyUI launches hosted cloud workflows
summary: Comfy's official cloud runs any workflow graph without local GPUs, with shareable links. Removes the hardware barrier for node-based pipelines.

headline: Hunyuan 3.5 video weights hit Hugging Face
summary: Tencent released open weights for its 1080p image-to-video model with 12-second clips. Strongest open alternative to closed video models this quarter.

headline: Ideogram 4 adds full typographic layout control
summary: Version 4 takes explicit font, kerning and grid instructions inside the prompt. Poster and title-card work no longer needs a separate design pass.
